source_run: generate (flat unbiased draw over box[-2,0.7]x[-1.2,1.2], fw logU[0.003,0.05]) + AcceptBand validity screen (interior<=0.80 & esc_median>=3 & spread>=20), then v6-scored, v6-good dropped, stratified by reject depth.
purpose: v6 classifier-coverage blind-spot probe: human-label unbiased ∧ validity-screened ∧ v6-REJECT mandelbrot crops to test for false-negative-good outside v6's learned good region. Verdict logic: q3 in near-miss=threshold-calibration lever; q3 in mild/v6-bad=v6 coverage gap (retrain); no q3=recall is throughput-only.

score_recipe.note: sets reject-status + stratum; DIFFERS from label recipe (intended)

probe_manifest: probe_manifest.jsonl (image_id -> stratum + v6 p_notbad/p_good; NOT in images.jsonl provenance — never shown to labeler)
